subcodes.first_line: O esteemed Vahid, a few days ago an epistle was penned. Now as to the letter addressed to Aqa Siyyid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت وحید چند روز پیش نامه ای مرقوم گردید حال مکتوبی که به آقا سید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
